title: Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple is a Hindu temple located in Chemmanthatta, Thrissur District.
overview.description: Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple is a Hindu temple located in Chemmanthatta, Thrissur District. According to folklore, sage Parashurama installed the idol. It is the part of the 108 Shiva temples of Kerala. Archaeological Survey of India and Kerala Urayma Devaswom board Chemmanthatta control the temple.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Eyyal
topPlaces.description: Eyyal is a village in Thrissur District in the state of Kerala, India. Archeologists unearthed a collection of old Roman coins in 1946.

topPlaces.name: Eyyal burial cave
topPlaces.description: Eyyal Burial Cave is a prehistoric Megalith rock cut cave situated in Eyyal, of Thrissur District of Kerala. The cave can be accessed from single entry and its chamber is circular.

topPlaces.name: Chemmanthatta
topPlaces.description: Chemmanthatta is a village located in the Thrissur district of Kerala, India, approximately 6 kilometers from Kunnamkulam town. A notable landmark in Chemmanthatta is the Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple, a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Vellattanjur
topPlaces.description: Vellatanjur or Vellatanjoor is a small village in the Thrissur, District of Kerala, India on the banks of Kechery river. This village is located 25 km NorthEast of the Thrissur city, 20 km SouthEast of the Kunnamkulam town and 18 km NorthEast of the Guruvayur township where the famous Guruvayur temple is situated.

topPlaces.name: Mathur Shiva Temple
topPlaces.description: Mathur Shiva Temple is a Hindu temple located in Kunnamkulam of Thrissur District, Kerala, India. It is believed that the Siva linga is Rudrakshasila which is irregular in shape, red in colour and is untouched by the human sculptor.

topPlaces.name: Chiranellur
topPlaces.description: Chiranellur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: St. Thomas Forane Church, Mattom
topPlaces.description: St. Thomas Forane Church is a Syro-Malabar Catholic church located in Mattom of Thalapilly Taluk in the Thrissur district of Kerala, south India.

topPlaces.name: Chowannur
topPlaces.description: Chowannur is a place in Thrissur district, state of Kerala, India.

items.note: Eyyal is a village in Thrissur District in the state of Kerala, India. Archeologists unearthed a collection of old Roman coins in 1946.
Eyyal Burial Cave is a prehistoric Megalith rock cut cave situated in Eyyal, of Thrissur District of Kerala. The cave can be accessed from single entry and its chamber is circular.

Chemmanthatta is a village located in the Thrissur district of Kerala, India, approximately 6 kilometers from Kunnamkulam town. A notable landmark in Chemmanthatta is the Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple, a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva.

Vellatanjur or Vellatanjoor is a small village in the Thrissur, District of Kerala, India on the banks of Kechery river. This village is located 25 km NorthEast of the Thrissur city, 20 km SouthEast of the Kunnamkulam town and 18 km NorthEast of the Guruvayur township where the famous Guruvayur temple is situated.

Mathur Shiva Temple is a Hindu temple located in Kunnamkulam of Thrissur District, Kerala, India. It is believed that the Siva linga is Rudrakshasila which is irregular in shape, red in colour and is untouched by the human sculptor.
Chiranellur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (78 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chemmanthatta Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Eyyal, Eyyal burial cave, Chemmanthatta, Vellattanjur, Mathur Shiva Temple.
